M2440_NH_HOSPICE M2440 (M0900) Nursing Home Reason- Hospice Care This field indicates the reason the patient was admitted to a nursing home was for hospice care. 0 = Not Checked, 1 = Checked CHAR 1 x
M2440_NH_OTHER M2440 (M0900) Nursing Home Reason- Other This field indicates the reason the patient was admitted to a nursing home was for other reasons. 0 = Not Checked, 1 = Checked CHAR 1 x
